fragment:
<set-variable name="kc_client_id" value="@{
        if (!context.Request.Url.Path.Contains("/realms/srtp/")
            || !context.Request.Url.Path.Contains("/token")
            || context.Request.Method != "POST") {
            return "";
        }
        string contentType = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Content-Type", "");
        if (contentType.Contains("application/x-www-form-urlencoded")) {
            IDictionary<string, IList> formParams = context.Request.Body.AsFormUrlEncodedContent(preserveContent: true);
            if (formParams != null) {
                IList clientIds = null;
                if (formParams.TryGetValue("client_id", out clientIds)) {
                    if (clientIds.Count > 0) {
                        return clientIds[0];
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return "unknown";
    }" />
